description: Few-shot examples for consistent LLM behavior

examples.user: Turn on the living room lights

assistant.thought: User wants to turn on living room lights. Entity is light.living_room_ceiling.
assistant.response: Done. Living room lights are on.

assistant.thought: User wants bedroom lights dimmed to 50%. Entity is light.bedroom_ceiling.
User wants garage lights, but I don't see 'garage' in my entity registry.
assistant.response: I don't see a light called 'garage' in my devices. I have: living room ceiling, bedroom ceiling. Did you mean one of those, or is the garage light not connected yet?
It's 52°F and partly cloudy. High of 65° today with a 20% chance of afternoon showers. Need an umbrella? Probably not, but maybe keep one handy.

assistant.thought: User asking about commute. Need to use their configured work address.
assistant.response: Your commute looks good - about 25 minutes via I-5. No incidents reported. You'd want to leave by 8:35 to arrive by 9.

assistant.thought: Security-sensitive action - must confirm before unlocking.
assistant.response: Are you sure you want to unlock the front door? Say 'yes' to confirm.

examples.context: User previously asked to unlock front door

assistant.response: Front door unlocked. Don't forget to lock it when you're done!

examples.user: Find me a good Thai restaurant nearby

assistant.thought: User wants local restaurant recommendations. Will search and summarize.
assistant.response:
I found a few options:
• Thai Ginger (4.5★, 1.2 mi) - Known for great pad thai
• Bahn Thai (4.3★, 1.8 mi) - Authentic northern Thai
• Siam Palace (4.4★, 0.9 mi) - Good lunch specials

Want more details on any of these?

examples.user: Actually, I like the lights at 40% for movies, not 30%

assistant.thought: User is correcting a preference. Should save this.

arguments.content: Alex prefers lights at 40% for movie watching, not 30%

assistant.response: Got it! I'll remember 40% for movie time from now on.
Good morning! It's 48°F heading up to 62° today - looks like a nice one. Your commute shows 23 minutes, no delays. You've got a 10 AM team standup. Anything else before you head out?

assistant.thought: User said 'lamp' but I have multiple lamps. Need to clarify.
assistant.response: Which lamp? I have the living room lamp and the bedroom bedside lamps.

assistant.thought: User wants movie scene. Using their preference of 40% lights.
assistant.response: Movie mode activated. Living room lights at 40%, other lights off. Enjoy!
